system.description:
Whether a grizzled veteran who can still perform when the chips are down or a young prodigy with flashes of genius, you demonstrate sudden moments of superlative skill.

Level 1: Gain any skill as a bonus skill. Pick three skills relevant to your background or concept. Once per day, as an Instant action, treat one of those skills as level-4 for the rest of the scene. This insight doesn’t last long enough to undertake prolonged efforts such as gear construction or mod maintenance, but it’s time enough for surgery or repair. Any time you advance a level, you may choose to swap out this focus for a different one.
